rulings.Case Title: PETER PEDRETTI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Civil
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Brayton Purcell LLP¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless a representative of the Brayton law firm informs Mr. Pedretti of this tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ERNEST STONE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Alexandra Nassopoulos
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant W.W. Henry Co.¿s motion for determination of good faith settlement is denied. Without knowing the amount of the settlement agreed to by the moving party, the court cannot evaluate whether the settlement is in good faith under CCP 877.6. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473 And To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 7, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendant General Electric Company¿s motion for relief pursuant to C.C.P. § 473 and to compel further interrogatory responses is granted. Defendant showed that its failure to file its motion to compel within the 45-day period was due to mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect, namely, plaintiffs¿ counsel¿s representation that plaintiffs would provide substantive responses as soon as defendant provided a date certain for the deposition of its PMK. Plaintiffs must provide substantive verified responses to defendant¿s special interrogatories within five days. = (220/HEK)
